// ── Graphviz DOT ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
// Save the digraph{} block below to trie.dot, then run:
//   dot -Tsvg trie.dot -o trie.svg   (or: xdot trie.dot)

digraph storage_trie {
    graph [rankdir=LR, splines=line, ranksep=10]
    node  [shape=record, style="rounded,filled"]

    n0 [label="{ Root \n path=(root) \n hash=0xe14bf6b0ac… | { <p0> 0 | <p1> 1 | <p2> 2 | <p3> 3 | <p4> 4 | <p5> 5 | <p6> 6 | <p7> 7 | <p8> 8 | <p9> 9 | <pa> a | <pb> b | <pc> c | <pd> d | <pe> e | <pf> f } }" fillcolor="#ddeeff"];
